Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends by 2.63%. some traders ship according to market conditions;Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
